chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: Next let us see how to write an algorithm.Here already I have written one algorithm for swapping

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: two numbers or two elements.See I have used C language like syntax only.Only the thing

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: I have done is here I wrote algorithm to show that ok I am writing an algorithm.It is not

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: a program.Here if I compare with the C program here I have not written the data type of parameters.Yes

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: data types we do not decide at algorithm time.When we write a program then we decide what data

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: types are required.And here even I do not have a temporary variable declaration.Declaration

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: is not there directly it is used.It is understood unless you declare in the program you cannot

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: use it.But in algorithm we do not bother about those minor things that are related to language.This

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: is more like C.Now if you want to write in different way you can say this as begin and

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: this as end.Instead of lower brackets you can also say begin and end.Next you can use

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: this symbol also for assignment.Actually this is an assignment symbol that was used in some

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: old languages like Pascal language.So you can use that one or else you can use this

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: symbol for showing that this value is stored at this one.So now it is up to you how you

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: want to write it.I hope whatever I wrote you have understood it.So same way whatever you

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: write I should be able to understand at least you should be able to understand it or the

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: people who are involved in the project should be able to understand it.Who are using it

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: should be able to understand it.Right.So you can use any syntax there is no fixed syntax

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: for writing any algorithm.Let us see how to analyze an algorithm.What is the criteria

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: on which we analyze an algorithm.So the criteria is the first criteria is time.See the algorithms

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: are the procedures for solving problem whether you do it manually using pen and paper or

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: you make a program and let your machines do it.Whatever the method may be how much time

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: it is taking if the procedure is very lengthy and time consuming or whether the procedure

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: is very fast and quickly you can get the results.So that is one of the important criteria on which

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: we have to analyze.If you are devising a procedure or an algorithm then it should be time efficient.

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: Means it must be faster.So after writing the algorithms we analyze how much time it

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: is taking.So that time what we get is in the form of a function.We get a function time

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: function.We not get the watch time.Already I have shown you.You will get the function

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: time function.Now next is space.As the algorithm is going to be converted into a program and

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: it is going to run on the machine then we need to know how much memory space it will

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: consume.So that is the second criteria on which we will analyze an algorithm.So these

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: are the two major criteria on which the algorithms are analyzed.And furthermore if you have any

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: other criteria or any other factors you want to consider you can consider them.Now a days

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: every application is either internet based,web based or say cloud based.So data transfer

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: or network consumption is also an important criteria.How much data is going to be transferred?See

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: if the algorithm or means if the procedure that you are writing if it is unnecessary

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: transferring larger size data or it can be reduced or compressed whatever it is.So that

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: is one more important criteria that is how much data transfer is done.And now a days

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: most of the devices are hand held instead of PCs we are using palm tops and laptops

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: and tablets.Then power consumption is also a criteria.How much power it is consuming?And

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: one more criteria is if you are developing an algorithm for device drivers or system

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: level programming if you are developing something some algorithm if you are writing then you

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: may also need to know how much CPU registers it is consuming.So CPU will also have some

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: memory called as registers.How many registers it is consuming?That is also one of the worrying

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: factor when you are designing an algorithm or writing a program finally.So these are

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: few criteria I have listed and it depends on your requirement it depends on your project

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: right.What are the more criteria you need to analyze?Now let us see I have taken one

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: example to show you how we analyze an algorithm.So for analysis purpose we need to know that

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: time.So first we will do time analysis then we will do space analysis.Now time means how

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: much time this will take?This is not the watch time then how to assume?Now we say that every

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: statement in an algorithm takes one unit of time.Every simple statement in an algorithm

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: takes one unit of time.If suppose the algorithm is calling another algorithm it is using another

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: procedure then we have to analyze that also in detail.So simple means just statements

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: direct statements it is not a nested statement right.So single statement each statement takes

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: one unit of time.So here I assume it takes one unit of time one unit of time so total

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: time is 3.So the time function f of n is 3.Here we got the constant value because I have taken

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: a very simple algorithm and the answer is 3 that is some constant value right 3 or 30

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: whatever it is constant value fixed value we got.So there is a time function it is not

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: in terms of n just we got a constant value.Now here whatever the complexity in the statement

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: may be how lengthy the statement will be we say that it takes one unit of time.Let us

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: assume instead of this statement I have some statement saying x assign 5 into a plus 6

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: into b if this is the statement written in an algorithm.Then for this also we say it

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: takes one unit of time.But really if you see when you convert it to a program and finally

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: when it gets converted into machine code then how many statements it will have.For

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: each multiplication two statements then for addition one statement then assignment one

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: statement.So total four statements will be there but we don't want to go into that much

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: detail we don't want to see how it is going to get converted into machine code but simply

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: we analyze and say each statement takes one unit of time.Now suppose if you want to go

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: into detail analysis like this you can go into detail.You can imagine up to the level

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: of the machine code that is going to be generated.It is just like suppose you want to travel to

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: your friend's house in a car you don't have to think and you don't have to plan and analyze

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: simply you can take a car or your bike or vehicle and you can just start and reach his

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: place.Right that's simple.If you want to land on mars then simply you cannot take a satellite

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: so you cannot take a rocket and launch it and reach there.It is not easy.So you have

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: to analyze and design and make a complete plan so that your mission is successful.So

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: that's it.Here you need to go into each and every minor detail you have to take care of

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: it.So it depends on your requirement.So if you want to analyze into greater detail then

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: do it.From the subject point of view we will be doing it at basic level.Right.At a very

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: shallow level this brief analysis we will do will not go into much detail.But much detail

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: analysis can also be done.Next is space analysis.What are the variables used here?For a space I

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: will write down the variables.A is one parameter,B is also a parameter and temp is the local

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: variable used.So total how many variables?1,2 and 3.So there are 3 variables used.So the

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: space is constant again.It is just 3.I got the answer as 3.So again it is also constant.So

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: usually we represent them as order of 1.Constant means order of 1.And that's also order of

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: 1.Means it is constant.1 represents constant.If it is 3 also we write 1.If it is 3000 also

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: we write 1 saying that it is constant.Value is constant.So this is how each statement

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: is taken as one unit of time and each variable is taken as one word.So these are 3 words.Why

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: we are saying words there not bytes?We don't know.When we convert it to a program it may

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: be an integer type or float type or double type that we don't know.So that's why we say

chunks.title: How Write and Analyze Algorithm
chunks.text: it is taking words.
